name: OpenSSF Scorecard: Fuzzing
description: Check whether the project implements fuzz testing through OSS-Fuzz, ClusterFuzzLite, or native language fuzzing frameworks. Fuzzing discovers memory corruption, input validation failures, and crash-inducing edge cases that unit tests miss.
match: no fuzz testing configuration or fuzz test targets detected
replacement: integrate with OSS-Fuzz or add language-native fuzz targets (cargo-fuzz, go-fuzz, jazzer, atheris)
